expectations.text: Recommends extraction of data fetching from rendering concern
expectations.evidence: Section 1 explicitly recommends extracting the useEffect + fetch call into a dedicated hook (useDashboardData). Section 3 extracts chart rendering into a presentational component (DashboardChart).

expectations.text: Does NOT blindly recommend extracting everything -- applies judgment about when extraction adds unnecessary layers
expectations.evidence: Two instances of restraint: (1) prioritization section advises doing the hook extraction first and notes the rest follow naturally; (2) React Query/SWR section explicitly states do not add a data-fetching library solely for this component.

expectations.text: Any new files or functions use named exports
expectations.evidence: All four constructs use named exports: export function useDashboardData, export function transformDashboardData, export function DashboardChart, export function Dashboard. No default exports anywhere.

assertion_critique: All 3 assertions pass without the skill -- eval 3 remains non-discriminating for refactoring judgment
